issue_title: 🤖 fix: align best-of-N group label with workspace title in sidebar
issue_body_preview:
## Summary

Fixes misaligned best-of-N group labels (variant names or A/B/C letters) in the left sidebar by switching from center-aligned to baseline-aligned flex layout.

## Background

When a workspace is a sub-agent in a best-of-N fleet, a group label (either an explicit variant name or a letter
test_description_zh: 在左侧边栏中查看属于 best-of-N 组的工作区条目，观察组标签（变体名称或 A/B/C 字母）与工作区标题之间的垂直对齐情况。
expected_result_zh: best-of-N 组标签与工作区标题在左侧边栏中应基线对齐（baseline），两者文本底部处于同一水平线上，不出现垂直方向的错位。
